name: Clarks Cushion Heel Pump

description: Responsive running shoe with ReactX foam and Zoom Air units. Engineered mesh upper for breathability. Perfect for daily training and long-distance runs.

description: Professional-quality stand mixer with 10-speed options and multiple attachments. Essential tool for bakers and home cooks preparing doughs, whipped creams, and batters. Available in multiple colors.

name: Instant Pot Duo Plus Pressure Cooker
description: Versatile 7-in-1 pressure cooker and multi-cooker for fast meal preparation. Includes slow cooker, rice cooker, and steamer functions. Safe and reliable with dual pressure settings.

name: Dyson V15 Cordless Vacuum

name: Le Creuset Dutch Oven 5.5qt
description: Premium enameled cast iron Dutch oven for versatile cooking applications. Suitable for stovetop, oven, and slow cooking. Classic design with superior heat retention and durability.

name: Cuisinart 14-Cup Food Processor
description: Powerful food processor with multiple blade attachments for chopping, slicing, and kneading. Ideal for meal prep, baking, and sauce making. Large 14-cup capacity for family-sized portions.

name: Levi's 501 Original Jeans
description: Iconic straight-fit jeans with timeless appeal and durability. Premium denim construction featuring a button fly and classic five-pocket styling. Perfect for casual and dressed-up occasions.

name: Patagonia Better Sweater Fleece Jacket
description: Eco-friendly fleece jacket made from recycled polyester with soft comfort and durability. Ideal for layering in cooler weather and outdoor activities. High collar design provides extra warmth.

name: Brooks Brothers Non-Iron Dress Shirt
description: Classic dress shirt with non-iron treatment for easy care and professional appearance. Perfect for business meetings and formal occasions. Available in multiple colors and a tailored fit.

description: Rugged 6-inch waterproof boot with premium leather construction. Ideal for outdoor work and casual wear. Features Timberland's signature comfort technology for all-day wearability.

description: Lightweight polo shirt with moisture-wicking technology designed for active lifestyles. Perfect for golf, casual wear, or training. Soft fabric with anti-odor properties keeps you fresh.

name: Ray-Ban Aviator Classic Sunglasses

name: Herschel Retreat Backpack
description: Versatile daypack with spacious compartments and comfortable padded straps. Perfect for school, work, or travel. Made from durable materials with smart organization pockets.

name: Fossil Leather Wallet

name: Pandora Moments Bracelet
description: Charm bracelet featuring Pandora's elegant Moments design with smooth sterling silver base. Perfect for adding personalized charms and creating a unique piece. Timeless gift option.

name: Samsonite Freeform Carry-On Luggage
description: Lightweight carry-on luggage with durable polycarbonate shell and smooth rolling wheels. Features TSA-compliant lock and multiple organizational pockets. Ideal for frequent travelers.

name: Dyson Airwrap Complete

name: Jo Malone Wood Sage & Sea Salt Cologne
description: Fresh and sophisticated unisex cologne with natural notes of ambrette seed and driftwood. Perfect for everyday wear or special occasions. Versatile scent that layers well with other fragrances.

description: Premium yoga mat with superior grip and cushioning for all yoga styles and meditation. Made from natural rubber with eco-friendly materials. Non-slip surface provides stability during practice.

description: Premium true wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation and high-quality audio. IPX7 water resistance makes them suitable for workouts and outdoor use. Seamless Galaxy device integration.

name: Anker 737 Power Bank
description: Massive 24000mAh power bank with multiple ports and fast charging technology. Suitable for charging multiple devices simultaneously. Compact design despite large capacity.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
description: Premium wireless mouse designed for productivity with customizable buttons and precision scrolling. Ergonomic design reduces hand fatigue during long work sessions. Multi-device connectivity.

name: Adidas Ultraboost Light Running Shoe
description: Lightweight running shoe with responsive Boost cushioning and Primeknit upper. Designed for speed and comfort during distance running. Modern aesthetic suitable for training and casual wear.

name: Canada Goose Expedition Parka
description: Premium insulated parka with Canada Goose's signature down fill technology. Extreme weather protection rated for temperatures below -30°C. Water-resistant shell with knit ribbed trim.

name: Lululemon Align Leggings
description: Signature yoga leggings with buttery-soft Nulux fabric. Four-way stretch design provides complete freedom of movement. High-waisted design with secure pocket for everyday wear.

name: Nike Air Max 270
description: Nike's first lifestyle shoe with Max Air unit in the heel. Lightweight mesh upper and foam midsole deliver all-day comfort with bold, modern style.

name: Nike Pegasus 40 Running Shoe
description: The workhorse of Nike running. React foam cushioning with Zoom Air unit at the forefoot. Breathable mesh upper with secure fit system.

name: Nike Dunk Low
description: Originally a basketball shoe, the Nike Dunk is now a cultural staple. Clean leather overlays, padded collar, and iconic color-blocking make it a must-have.

name: Nike Air Jordan 1 Retro High OG
description: The shoe that started it all. The Air Jordan 1 Retro High OG features premium leather and iconic Wings logo. A timeless silhouette loved by sneakerheads worldwide.

name: Adidas Ultraboost 23
description: The ultimate running shoe made with 100% natural and renewable Primeknit+ upper. BOOST midsole returns energy with every step. Responsive and sustainable.

name: Adidas Samba OG
description: A timeless classic born on the indoor football pitch. Soft leather upper with suede toe box and distinctive 3-Stripes. The Samba OG is everywhere right now.

name: Adidas Stan Smith
description: The most iconic tennis shoe ever. Clean perforated 3-Stripes, smooth leather, and minimal branding. A wardrobe staple for 50+ years.

name: New Balance 990v6
description: Made in USA. The 990v6 carries forward 40 years of craftsmanship with premium pigskin suede, ENCAP midsole technology, and Ortholite sockliner.

name: New Balance 574 Core
description: The 574 is one of New Balance's most iconic silhouettes. ENCAP midsole, suede/mesh upper, and versatile styling make it perfect for everyday wear.

name: Hoka Clifton 9 Running Shoe
description: Maximum cushioning with a feather-light feel. The Hoka Clifton 9 features an early-stage Meta-Rocker for smooth transitions and a breathable engineered mesh upper.

name: Vans Old Skool
description: Vans' first skate shoe with the iconic side stripe. Durable suede and canvas upper with waffle rubber outsole. A skateboarding legend turned streetwear staple.

name: Converse Chuck Taylor All Star High Top
description: The original basketball shoe turned cultural icon. Canvas upper, iconic star ankle patch, and rubber cupsole. Worn by everyone from athletes to rock stars.

name: Apple MacBook Pro 14" M3 Pro
description: Built for pros who demand the most. The M3 Pro chip with 11-core CPU and 14-core GPU. Liquid Retina XDR display, up to 22 hours battery, MagSafe charging, and a full suite of ports.

name: Dell XPS 15 (2024)
description: Premium Windows laptop with 15.6-inch OLED display, Intel Core Ultra 9 processor, and NVIDIA RTX 4060 GPU. Perfect for creative professionals and power users.

name: HP Spectre x360 14"
description: Ultra-premium 2-in-1 convertible with Intel Evo certification. OLED touch display, 360-degree hinge, and stylus support. Thin, light, and powerful.

name: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 12
description: The business laptop benchmark. Military-grade durability (MIL-SPEC), 14-inch IPS display, Intel Core Ultra, and legendary ThinkPad keyboard. Under 2.48 lbs.

name: ASUS ZenBook 14 OLED
description: Slim and stylish with a stunning 14-inch 2.8K OLED display. AMD Ryzen 7 processor, lightweight aluminum chassis, and ErgoSense keyboard. Great value premium laptop.

name: Microsoft Surface Laptop 5
description: Polished aluminum design with a vibrant PixelSense touch display. Intel Core i7, fast SSD, and Dolby Atmos audio. A refined everyday laptop with pen support.

name: Apple iPhone 15 Pro
description: Titanium design. A17 Pro chip. 48MP main camera with 3x optical zoom. Dynamic Island, Action button, and USB-C with USB 3 speeds. The most advanced iPhone ever.

name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
description: The most powerful Galaxy yet. Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 200MP camera, built-in S Pen, 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display with 120Hz. AI-powered Galaxy AI features.

name: Google Pixel 8 Pro
description: Google's smartest phone. Tensor G3 chip, 50MP triple camera system with pro video, 6.7-inch LTPO display, and 7 years of OS/security updates. Best Android camera.

name: Bose QuietComfort 45
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with high-fidelity audio. Soft ear cushions, adjustable headband, and 24 hours of battery life. Triport acoustic architecture.

name: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Headphones
description: Bose's best-ever headphones. Immersive Audio with head tracking brings music to life around you. CustomTune personalizes sound and noise cancellation to your ears.

name: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Gen)
description: Next-level active noise cancellation with Transparency mode. Adaptive Audio adjusts to your environment. MagSafe charging case with built-in speaker. H2 chip.

name: Samsung Galaxy Buds2 Pro
description: 24-bit Hi-Fi audio with intelligent ANC that adapts to your environment. Ergonomic comfort fit, 360 Audio, and seamless Galaxy ecosystem integration.

name: Apple Watch Series 9
description: The most powerful Apple Watch yet. S9 chip with Double Tap gesture. Always-On Retina display, advanced health sensors, crash detection, and carbon neutral.

name: Samsung Galaxy Watch 6 Classic
description: Premium stainless steel with iconic rotating bezel. Comprehensive health tracking, BioActive Sensor, sleep coaching, and 2-day battery life. Google Wear OS.

name: Fitbit Charge 6
description: Advanced fitness tracker with built-in GPS, Google apps (Maps, Wallet), stress tracking, and 7-day battery. Heart rate, SpO2, skin temp, and EDA sensors.

name: Apple iPad Pro 13" (M4)
description: Unbelievably thin and light with the M4 chip. Ultra Retina XDR OLED display, Apple Pencil Pro support, and Magic Keyboard compatibility. The ultimate iPad.

name: Samsung Galaxy Tab S9 Ultra
description: The largest and most powerful Galaxy tablet. 14.6-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 2, S Pen included, and dual front cameras in a notch cutout.

name: Ralph Lauren Classic Fit Polo Shirt
description: The iconic polo. Soft cotton piqué with a classic fit and signature pony embroidery. A timeless wardrobe essential for any occasion from casual to smart-casual.

name: Tommy Hilfiger Oxford Shirt
description: Classic American style oxford shirt. Soft, breathable cotton fabric with button-down collar and Tommy flag embroidery at the chest.

name: Calvin Klein Slim Fit Jeans
description: Sleek slim fit jeans in premium stretch denim. CK logo on the back waistband. Sits at waist with slim fit through hip, thigh, and leg.

name: Gap Logo Pullover Hoodie
description: The essential hoodie. Soft fleece with brushed interior, iconic GAP arch logo, kangaroo pocket, and ribbed cuffs. Relaxed fit, perfect for layering.

name: Zara Oversized Blazer
description: Structured oversized blazer in premium fabric. Notched lapels, flap pockets, and a single-button front. Pairs perfectly with wide-leg pants or miniskirts.

name: Free People Sundrenched Midi Dress
description: Flowy midi dress in lightweight cotton blend with floral print. V-neckline, adjustable spaghetti straps, and tiered skirt for effortless boho style.

name: Nike Tech Fleece Joggers
description: Nike's innovative Tech Fleece fabric is engineered to be lightweight yet warm. Tapered fit with bonded seams and ribbed cuffs for a sleek, modern look.

name: Adidas Tiro 23 Track Pants
description: Classic football-inspired track pants. Moisture-absorbing AEROREADY fabric, slim fit through the leg, and ankle zip for easy on/off. Available in bold colorways.

name: L'Oreal Paris Revitalift Moisturizer
description: Pro-Retinol and Centella Asiatica anti-aging moisturizer. Reduces wrinkles and firms skin in 4 weeks. Lightweight, non-greasy formula suitable for all skin types.

name: Neutrogena Hydro Boost Gel Cream
description: Dermatologist recommended. Hyaluronic acid gel-cream locks in moisture for 48 hours. Oil-free, non-comedogenic, and lightweight. Leaves skin plump and supple.

name: Estée Lauder Advanced Night Repair Serum
description: The iconic little brown bottle. Chronolux Power Signal Technology repairs skin overnight. Reduces fine lines, wrinkles, dark spots, and dullness. 40+ years of innovation.

name: Maybelline Lash Sensational Sky High Mascara
description: Lengthens lashes to sky high heights. Flex Tower Brush with increasing rows of bristles reaches even the tiniest lashes. Buildable, flake-free formula.

name: Vitamix E310 Explorian Blender
description: Professional-grade blending in a compact size. 10 variable speeds, pulse feature, and hardened stainless-steel blades that blend whole foods. 5-year warranty.

name: Ninja Foodi 9-in-1 Pressure Cooker & Air Fryer
description: TenderCrisp technology combines pressure cooking and air frying. 9 cooking functions: pressure cook, air fry/crisp, steam, slow cook, sear/sauté, bake/roast, broil, yogurt, dehydrate.

name: Keurig K-Elite Coffee Maker
description: Single-serve coffee maker with a strong brew setting and iced coffee mode. Hot water on demand, 5 brew sizes, and 75 oz removable reservoir. Compatible with My K-Cup.

name: Ninja Air Fryer Max XL
description: Max Crisp Technology at 450°F for crispier results with up to 75% less fat. 5.5 qt capacity feeds a family. Wide temperature range for air fry, roast, reheat, and dehydrate.

name: Hydro Flask 32oz Wide Mouth Bottle
description: TempShield double-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks cold 24 hours and hot 12 hours. Wide mouth design, pro-grade stainless steel, and powder coat finish. BPA-free.

name: Theragun Prime Massage Gun
description: Percussive therapy device with QuietForce Technology. 5 built-in speeds, 4 attachments, 120-minute battery, and Bluetooth connectivity with app. Professional recovery at home.

name: Bowflex SelectTech 552 Adjustable Dumbbells
description: Replace 15 sets of weights. Dial selector adjusts from 5 to 52.5 lbs. Smooth handle, molded seats, and the ability to change weight in seconds. Home gym essential.

name: Coach Tabby 26 Shoulder Bag
description: A modern classic. Refined pebble leather with Coach's iconic Horse and Carriage hardware. Adjustable strap wears crossbody or on shoulder. Magnetic pillow closure.

name: Michael Kors Jet Set Large Tote
description: The bag that started it all. Signature logo jacquard exterior with gold-tone hardware and top zip closure. Spacious interior fits a laptop. Detachable card holder.

name: Tumi Alpha 3 Backpack
description: The ultimate travel and work backpack. Ballistic nylon construction with TSA-friendly laptop compartment, removable pouches, and signature T-Pass pocket. Lifetime guarantee.

name: Coleman Sundome 4-Person Tent
description: Easy setup in about 15 minutes with ColorSync poles. WeatherTec system with welded floors and inverted seams keeps water out. Large door and windows for ventilation.

name: The North Face ThermoBall Eco Jacket
description: Warm when wet with PrimaLoft ThermoBall Eco insulation from 100% recycled materials. Compresses into its own pocket. Windproof, water-resistant DWR finish.
